interface.shortDescription: Routes first, minimizes agents, and uses contract-based Light, Standard, or Deep execution.
interface.longDescription: Acts as a token-efficient team orchestrator. It runs a lightweight Router first, selects Light, Standard, or Deep mode, executes only required roles among PM, CTO, Frontend, Backend, Architect, Domain, QA, Security, Coder, Integrator, and Skill Evaluator, compresses context before handoff, validates structured contracts, applies selective retry policy, and produces a concise final decision.
defaultPrompt: $team Route this request, choose Light, Standard, or Deep mode, execute only required agents, and provide the final team decision.
$team Use the smallest sufficient orchestration path and exchange only structured contracts between agents.
$team Evaluate routing accuracy, token efficiency, contract validation, and unnecessary agent execution.
